# Instructions for the Checkmate CLI Project

Use `docs` directory to getting information about the Checkmate CLI project.

- `docs/PRD.md` - Product Requirements Document
- `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` - Architecture of the Checkmate CLI project
- `docs/ROADMAP.md` - Roadmap for the Checkmate CLI project

## Markdown Guidelines

1. Use this [markdown rules](https://github.com/DavidAnson/markdownlint/blob/main/doc/Rules.md)
2. Follow the `./.markdownlint.json` configuration file.
3. Write clear and concise content.
4. Use proper headings and subheadings.
5. Do not write the file path to the bottom of the file.
6. Use `-` for unordered list bullet points.

## Checkmate Information

Checkmate is an open source monitoring tool used to track the operational status and performance of servers and websites.
It regularly checks whether a server/website is accessible and performs optimally, providing real-time alerts and reports on the monitored services' availability, downtime, and response time.

### API Documentation for Checkmate

Checkmate's API is documented in accordance with the OpenAPI spec.

Use this [checkmate-openapi-specs](https://github.com/bluewave-labs/checkmate-backend/blob/master/openapi.json) for the API documentation.
